OVERALL_VERDICT: GO_WITH_FIXES

# Synthesis — GO_WITH_FIXES + security finding fixture

Reviewers approve the design with minor fixes; security-architect flagged one issue tagged `sev:security`.

```check-verdict
{
  "schema_version": 1,
  "prompt_version": "check-verdict@1.0",
  "verdict": "GO_WITH_FIXES",
  "blocking_findings": [],
  "security_findings": [
    {
      "finding_id": "SEC-01",
      "severity": "high",
      "tag": "sev:security",
      "summary": "Plan stores raw API token in run-state.json without redaction; tokens leak to morning-report."
    }
  ],
  "summary": "Design GO_WITH_FIXES; one security finding present — hardcoded block fires."
}
```
